results.question: How many reported Hypotheses does each paper have?
results.pgmr_prediction: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?count) WHERE { ?paper pgmr:has_contribution ?contribution . ?contribution a pgmrc:empirical_research_practice_contribution . ?contribution pgmr:venue_serie ?venue . ?venue rdfs:label ?venueName . ?contribution pgmr:data_analysis ?dataAnalysis . ?dataAnalysis pgmr:inferential_statistics ?inferentialStatistics . ?inferentialStatistics pgmr:hypothesis ?hypothesis . FILTER(LCASE(STR(?venueName)) = LCASE("IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference")) FILTER(LCASE(STR(?hypothesis)) IN ("true", "yes", "1")) }
results.restored_prediction: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?count) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 . ?contribution orkgp:P135046 ?venue . ?venue rdfs:label ?venueName . ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?dataAnalysis . ?dataAnalysis orkgp:P56043 ?inferentialStatistics . ?inferentialStatistics orkgp:P30001 ?hypothesis . FILTER(LCASE(STR(?venueName)) = LCASE("IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference")) FILTER(LCASE(STR(?hypothesis)) IN ("true", "yes", "1")) }

results.question: How often is each research paradigm reported across the corpus?
results.pgmr_prediction: SELECT ?researchParadigm ?researchParadigmLabel WHERE { ?paper pgmr:has_contribution ?contribution . ?contribution a pgmrc:empirical_research_practice_contribution . ?contribution pgmr:venue_serie ?venue . ?venue rdfs:label ?venueName . ?contribution pgmr:data_analysis ?dataAnalysis . ?dataAnalysis pgmr:inferential_statistics ?inferentialStatistics . ?inferentialStatistics pgmr:research_paradigm ?researchParadigm . ?researchParadigm rdfs:label ?researchParadigmLabel . FILTER(LCASE(STR(?venueName)) = LCASE("IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference")) ORDER BY ?researchParadigmLabel }

results.question: How is the reporting of each data type for research data distributed across publication years?
results.pgmr_prediction: SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE { ?paper pgmr:has_contribution ?contribution . ?contribution a pgmrc:empirical_research_practice_contribution . ?contribution pgmr:venue_serie ?venue . ?venue rdfs:label ?venueName . ?paper pgmr:publication_year ?year . ?contribution pgmr:data_collection ?dataCollection . ?dataCollection pgmr:data ?researchData . ?researchData pgmr:data_type ?dataType . ?dataType rdfs:label ?dataTypeLabel . FILTER(LCASE(STR(?venueName)) = LCASE("IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference")) ORDER BY ?year }
